model.name: RIFE 4.25-lite

officialPracticalRifeObservation.verification: External research observation only; this archive is not acquired or verified by the bootstrap script.

model.conversionBlocker: The reference plugin does not publish a reproducible conversion recipe that proves its ncnn param/bin came from the pinned official Practical-RIFE weights. The files are prototype inputs only.

pipelineModes.purpose: same-DLL baseline retaining the duplicate wrapper and checked-core planar host preparation
direct BGRA8 packing into persistent ncnn host Mats with no wrapper planar workspace
direct BGRA8 fill into persistent mapped Vulkan staging with persistent ncnn allocators, command state, and fixed pre/postprocess device buffers; remains a synchronized host round trip

supportedSpikeContract.gpuRoundTripDefinition: Host steady-clock time around ncnn command setup, host-to-device upload, model execution, synchronized device-to-host download, and allocator work; not a Vulkan timestamp or kernel-only result.

persistentVulkanFixedMemoryEstimate.excludes: model, graph workspace, allocator block slack, and ordinary process memory

supportedSpikeContract.gpuNativeInputStatus: unsupported in this spike: the pinned ncnn runtime has no Windows D3D11/Win32 external-memory import and synchronization boundary for these frames

releasePolicy: Do not add this DLL, model, or its dependencies to Store or portable artifacts until conversion provenance and the complete redistribution inventory are closed.
